text.title: Communications Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the communications-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: segment_channel_fit
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Channel must match segment preference (exec → 1-page summary; dev → channel post; ops → dashboard); no one-size-fits-all.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `segment-channel-fit` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: status_cadence_honoured
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Status reports must ship on the agreed cadence; missed report is itself a status signal.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `status-cadence-honoured` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: action_owner_due
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Every meeting action must have owner + due date + linked issue before the meeting closes.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `action-owner-due` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: two_way_channel
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Plan must include at least one two-way channel per segment (not broadcast-only).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `two-way-channel` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: crisis_path_named
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Comms plan must name the crisis-path (who notifies whom in <1h on critical event).
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `crisis-path-named` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-communications-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
